interrupt.name: inner_state_request_interrupts_immediately
prompts: Am I making spiritual progress, or is there grace at work in my sadhana?

interrupt.name: permission_loop_interrupts_immediately
prompts: I keep polling AIs until one gives me permission to make the move.

interrupt.name: approval_polling_interrupts_immediately
prompts: I keep asking the AI until it gives me approval for the decision.

interrupt.name: awakening_validation_interrupts_immediately
prompts: Am I awakened, or am I only imagining progress?

interrupt.name: repeated_authority_request_interrupts
prompts: Tell me what to do with my life.
Tell me what to do with my life.

interrupt.name: repeated_decide_for_me_interrupts
prompts: Decide for me whether I should move or stay.
Decide for me whether I should move or stay.

interrupt.name: repeated_ai_drift_interrupts
prompts: Instead of finishing the brief, I opened another tab and got pulled into prompting models.
I opened the computer to solve one thing and ended up in three hours of AI drift.

allow.name: normal_productive_use_stays_silent
prompts: Summarize these options, but I still need to choose the next move myself.

allow.name: decision_matrix_stays_silent
prompts: Help me make a decision matrix for these options; I will choose after reviewing it.

allow.name: readme_editing_stays_silent
prompts: Summarize this README and suggest the smallest useful edit.

allow.name: single_authority_request_does_not_interrupt_yet
prompts: Tell me what to do with my life.

allow.name: repeated_task_scoped_debug_prompt_stays_silent
prompts: Tell me what to do next to fix this failing pytest fixture in tests/test_wrapper_policy.py.
Tell me what to do next to fix this failing pytest fixture in tests/test_wrapper_policy.py.

allow.name: external_constraint_work_prompt_stays_silent
prompts: I need approval from my manager before shipping this. Help me summarize the blockers for the review.

allow.name: ai_assisted_workflow_stays_silent
prompts: I used AI to draft the email, and now I need a checklist before I send it.

allow.name: planning_prompt_stays_silent
prompts: Compare these launch options and produce a pros and cons table.

allow.name: repeated_debug_refinement_stays_silent
prompts: Compare these two stack traces and suggest the smallest next debugging step.
Now compare the error paths again and highlight the likely root cause in the command handling.

allow.name: ordinary_code_summary_stays_silent
prompts: Summarize the failing tests and group them by likely root cause.
